notes: Core mechanics exist but platform collision is unreliable (player often falls through or gets stuck), barrel AI is simplistic and frequently despawns incorrectly, Pauline is placed mid-air at y:200 making the win condition nearly unreachable, and the visual layout bears little resemblance to the classic Donkey Kong arcade structure.

The build runs and basic movement/jumping/barrels work, but the level layout and progression are very incomplete versus Donkey Kong, with sparse ladders, crude visuals, and only a loose approximation of the original gameplay.
